functions.title: Guide Book #72

§7Guide Book #72§r
§lBrute Zombie§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Uncommon
•§lBehavior§r: Hostile
•§lMob type§r: Zombified, Undead, Humanoid, Monster, Boss.
•§lSpawns in§r: Zombie Dungeon
•§lHealth§r: 350

•§lKnockback resistance§r: 0.4
•§lWalk speed§r: 25
•§lImmune to§r: Daylight
•§lBreathes in§r: Air, Water.
•§lPossible drops§r: Stone Brute Zombie Trophy, Rotten Brute Flesh, XP Orbs.
•§lAggressive toward§r: Players, Iron Golem, Snow

Golem, Traders, Villagers, Players aggressive tamed mobs.
•§lMelee attack damage§r: 12-13
•§lMelee effect§r: Hunger §o(4:00)§r
•Can inflict a Hunger effect on all Players and Villagers within an 8-block radius.
•Can break crops, plants,
leaves, cobwebs, torches, & other non-solid block.§’

§lDescription§r:
 
§‘The Brute Zombie is an intimidating, high-health miniboss perfectly suited for deep Zombie Dungeons or late-game survival challenges. With 240 HP, daylight immunity, and area-of-effect Hunger, it adds both mechanical threat and

§’atmospheric tension to zombie-centric gameplay.
 
Its Hunger aura and strong melee strikes make close-range combat risky, especially for under-prepared players under siege. Its drops—like Rotten Brute Flesh or a Stone Brute Zombie Trophy.
